case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FOMERLY PROGRESS FINANICAL CORP.) VS. DANNY DANIEL MIRANDA NUNEZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FOMERLY PROGRESS FINANICAL CORP.)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,011.28 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FOMERLY PROGRESS FINANICAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT NUNEZ, DANNY DANIEL MIRANDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-07-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-07-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-07-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY NANCY ANGEL-HERRERA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT DANNY DANIEL MIRANDA NUNEZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-07-2017 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED DEC-18-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NUNEZ, DANNY DANIEL MIRANDA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FOMERLY PROGRESS FINANICAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NUNEZ, DANNY DANIEL MIRANDA $1,011.28 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,096.28 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
